mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS amount, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount FROM erp_sale_order o WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND o.order_time >= #{startTime} AND o.order_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT p.name AS productName, SUM(i.count) AS totalCount, SUM(i.total_price) AS totalAmount FROM erp_sale_order_items i INNER JOIN erp_sale_order o ON i.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN erp_product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 AND o.order_time >= #{startTime} AND o.order_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT c.name AS customerName, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount, SUM(o.total_price) AS totalAmount FROM erp_sale_order o INNER JOIN erp_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND c.deleted = 0 AND o.order_time >= #{startTime} AND o.order_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT 3
